Card Legality Policy

This page lists banned and restricted cards for each constructed format, and the current Living Legend rotation.

CardStatus
Enigma ChaliceBanned

Living Legend Rotation

The following heroes are currently rotated into Living Legend: Dorinthea Ironsong, Prism, Awakener of Sol.
